issues.description: DSL is missing required conditions. Card text specifies TWO conditions that must both be met: (1) DON count comparison (your field ≤ opponent's field), and (2) hand size check (5 or less cards in hand). DSL has no conditions array, making it unconditional.
Missing condition for DON card comparison: 'HasAttachedDon' with value operator checking your DON count ≤ opponent's DON count
Missing condition for hand size check: should verify hand contains 5 or fewer cards (requires hand count condition not currently in standard trigger set)
